// GOOD: use eq_ignore_ascii_case to avoid allocation
fn find_user(users: &[User], name: &str) -> Option<&User> {
    users.iter().find(|u| u.name.eq_ignore_ascii_case(name))
}

fn matches_header(headers: &[Header], key: &str) -> Option<&str> {
    headers.iter()
        .find(|h| h.name.eq_ignore_ascii_case(key))
        .map(|h| h.value.as_str())
}

fn is_content_type(response: &Response, expected: &str) -> bool {
    response.content_type.eq_ignore_ascii_case(expected)
}
